news.headline: China: To unleash consumption potential for AI products.

China's Premier Li: Boosting consumption is not only a key way to boost domestic demand and stabilise economic growth, but also a significant measure for mid to long-term growth transition - Chinese State Media
India scraps $3B treasury bill sale due to cash shortage.
China's Premier Li: We will direct more economic policy focus on boosting consumption
Eyesafe introduces new blue light glasses offering 2X protection for eyes and sleep, in collaboration with experts.
news.summary: In partnership with leading ophthalmologists and optometrists, Eyesafe® Eyewear incorporates cutting-edge lens technology by BluTech. This innovation aims to decrease eye fatigue and enhance sleep quality. Eyesafe is pioneering a new set of standards for blue light glasses, setting a benchmark in the industry for improved eye health.

news.headline: $5.5B swindled by pig butchering scams in 2024; major concern for retail crypto investors and platforms in 2025: Cyvers.
news.summary: Cyvers warns that in 2025, the primary danger facing retail crypto investors and crypto platforms is fraudulent schemes related to pig butchering. An increasing number of individuals are falling victim to these scams, with significant financial losses reported. This trend poses a critical risk to the security and stability of the crypto market, prompting heightened vigilance and caution among all involved parties.

news.headline: Libertex partners with KICK Sauber F1 Team, a groundbreaking multi-year deal in online trading.Character count: 87
news.summary: Libertex, a top online broker, has proudly revealed a significant multi-year partnership with KICK Sauber F1 Team. This groundbreaking collaboration is set to revolutionize the partnership landscape in the world of sports and finance.

news.headline: Lamar Advertising's Q4: Net revenue $579.6M, net loss $(1.0M), Adjusted EBITDA $278.5M. Twelve months: Net revenue $2.21B, net income $362.9M, Adjusted EBITDA $1.03B.CEO sees full-year AFFO growth with diluted AFFO per share at $8.13-$8.28 in 2025. Acquisition-adjusted net revenue up 4.3% in Q4 2024. Cash flow provided by operations rose in Q4. Recent sale of 20% equity interest in Vistar Media to T-Mobile for $115.1M. Expecting net income per diluted share for 2025 between $6.01-$6.07. Non-GAAP measures like adjusted EBITDA, FFO, AFFO, among others, help evaluate performance. Conf call on Feb 20 at 8:00 a.m. CT. Founded in 1902, Lamar is a leading outdoor advertising company with over 360,000 displays in the US and Canada. Net revenues Q4 2024: $579.6M, a 4.3% increase from Q4 2023. Operating income for Q4 2024: $36.7M vs. $191.7M for Q4 2023.3M and $3.52 for the twelve months ended December 31, 2024 and 2023, respectively.
news.summary: The news article discusses Lamar Advertising Company's financial results for the fourth quarter and year ended December 31, 2024. In the fourth quarter, Lamar reported a net revenue of $579.6 million, a net loss of $(1.0) million, and adjusted EBITDA of $278.5 million. For the twelve months ended December 31, 2024, Lamar reported net revenue of $2.21 billion, net income of $362.9 million, and adjusted EBITDA of $1.03 billion. Lamar's CEO highlighted revenue growth in the fourth quarter, driven by various factors. The company reported improvements in key financial metrics, though net income was impacted by a revision in the estimate of its asset retirement obligation. Forward guidance for fiscal year 2025 includes a net income per diluted share between $6.01 and $6.07 and diluted AFFO per share between $8.13 and $8.28. Lamar also provided a detailed explanation of non-GAAP financial measures used and will hold a conference call to further discuss the results.

news.headline: Almost 3 in 10 UK public sector IT pros worry about AI security risks. Budget constraints and threats are key concerns (23%).
news.summary: SolarWinds, a renowned IT management software provider, revealed its Next-Gen Government IT: AI and Observability Insights Report in London. The report highlighted the struggles encountered by public sector IT experts and the origins of IT security dangers. Among UK participants, findings indicated that budget limitations were the foremost hindrance to enhancing IT security (23%), with the primary source of security threats being undisclosed.

news.headline: Xairos supplies transportable optical ground station to X-lumin with mobilizer platforms and free-space optical terminal.
news.summary: Xairos, based in Lafayette, Colorado, is playing a key role in the development of the X-lumin transportable optical ground station. They are providing mobilizer platforms as well as a prototype of a free-space optical terminal. The ground station is designed to be portable and versatile for various applications. This innovative project aims to enhance communication capabilities through optical technology.

news.headline: Variational AI secures $5.5M financing to launch AI model for drug discovery; oversubscribed funding from investors.
news.summary: A start-up in Vancouver, British Columbia has secured funding from top AI and biotech investors for its compute-efficient generative AI foundation model used in small molecule drug discovery. The exact amount of funding was not disclosed.

news.headline: AppSOC partners with Databricks for DASF 2.0, offering AI security solutions for evolving needs of customers.
news.summary: In San Jose, California, AppSOC, a prominent company in AI governance and application security, has declared its ongoing partnership with Databricks, a leading Data and AI company. The collaboration aims to bolster the recent launch of Databricks AI Security Framework (DASF) 2.0. By teaming up with Databricks, AppSOC reaffirms its dedication to providing cutting-edge security and governance options customized for Databricks clients. This partnership builds upon the accomplishments of AppSOC's previous assistance for Databricks' AI Securi.

news.headline: Vena's FP&A platform leveraging Microsoft tech ecosystem earns industry recognitions for leadership in planning. #Vena #finance
news.summary: Vena, a leading FP&A platform designed to harness the capabilities of the Microsoft technology ecosystem, has recently received recognition in various industry reports. These acknowledgments underline Vena's position as a frontrunner in equipping finance and operations experts with an adaptable FP&A platform rooted in Excel. This platform improves user experience, streamlines processes, and provides tangible benefits to organizations seeking to enhance their planning procedures. Vena has been distinguished for its excellence.

news.headline: SolarWinds releases report on government IT security challenges, based on survey of 200 US IT professionals.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, SolarWinds (NYSE:SWI), a prominent supplier of efficient IT management software, revealed its Next-Gen Government IT: AI and Observability Insights Report. This report highlights the obstacles encountered by IT experts and the origins of IT security risks. Collaborating with Market Connections, a top government market research company, SolarWinds conducted an online study in December 2024. The survey focused on 200 U.S. IT decision-makers and influencers.

news.headline: Denmark's central bank: It is not certain that tariffs in the US would lead to higher inflation in Europe, as they could simultaneously slow down growth in Europe - and low demand can dampen inflation.
Lulus partners with Nuuly, Poshmark, Von Maur, Dillard’s, Nordstrom to host in-store prom events - enhancing market reach.
news.summary: The company has recently announced several new partnerships and initiatives to solidify its position as the leading destination for dresses. Collaborations with Nuuly, Poshmark, and Von Maur have been established, alongside in-store prom events at Dillard’s. Furthermore, the company has expanded its partnerships with Nordstrom. These efforts demonstrate the company's dedication to offering a wide range of dress options and enhancing its presence in the market.

news.headline: $5.5B stolen by pig butchering scams in 2024, posing top risk for retail crypto investors & platforms in 2025, Cyvers reports.
news.summary: Cyvers has identified pig butchering scams as the primary concern for retail crypto investors and platforms in 2025. The scams pose a significant threat due to their increasing frequency and severity. Investors and platforms need to be vigilant as the number of reported cases continues to rise.

news.headline: Targa Resources Corp reports record financial results for Q4 and FY 2024, plans growth in 2025, and refinances Badlands Preferred Equity.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, Targa Resources Corp. (NYSE: TRGP) announced its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024.

news.headline: Cenovus Energy Inc. reported $2.0B cash from operations, $1.6B adjusted flow, $123M free flow in Q4 2024, with 816K BOE/d production.
news.summary: Cenovus Energy Inc. revealed its financial results for Q4 and full-year 2024, showcasing substantial numbers. The company reported generating $2.0 billion in cash from operating activities, $1.6 billion in adjusted funds flow, and $123 million in free funds flow during the quarter. The Upstream sector performed well, producing 816,000 barrels of oil equivalent per day (BOE/d), a quarterly Oil Sands production record of 628,500 BOE/d. Downstream operations saw a rise in crude throughput by nearly 24,000 bbls/d from the previous quarter to reach 666,700 bbls/d, indicating an overall utilization rate of 93%.

news.headline: SPIN partners with PingPongParkinson to aid those living with Parkinson's. Collaboration announced on Feb. 20, 2025.
news.summary: SPIN, a renowned ping pong social club, has joined forces with PingPongParkinson, a non-profit organization under 501(c)(3) status established by musician Nenad, to provide support and optimism for individuals living with Parkinson's disease. This collaboration was announced on February 20, 2025, in New York.

news.headline: Commuters frustrated as aging NJ Transit system causes delays. Many at breaking point.
news.summary: In recent updates, it has been reported that the total number of confirmed COVID-19 cases in the country has reached a new peak of over 200,000, with a significant increase in the daily number of new cases. The death toll has also climbed to more than 4,000, which is a concerning development for health officials and the general public. Authorities are urging people to adhere to safety guidelines and preventive measures to help curb the spread of the virus. These alarming statistics highlight the importance of collective efforts in combating the pandemic and protecting public health.

news.headline: Gimme Credit report highlights China's DeepSeek R1 model shakeup in AI sector, challenging US dominance.
news.summary: In a recent report by Gimme Credit, it was highlighted that China's DeepSeek has caused a major disruption in the artificial intelligence (AI) industry with the introduction of its R1 model. The report, authored by Senior Bond Analyst Saurav Sen, sheds light on the notable influence of DeepSeek in the sector. Published on Feb. 20, 2025, the insights provide valuable information for industry players.

news.headline: New study on bullying shows a rise in reported cases by 30% last year, researchers identify underlying economic factors.
Sanctuary Wealth invests in Alluvial Private Wealth to support growth, part of Strategic Capital Partnership Program.
news.summary: An undisclosed amount of investment has been secured to bolster Alluvial's expansion plans, following Sanctuary's official rollout of its Strategic Capital Partnership Program. This initiative is designed to channel funds towards facilitating mergers and acquisitions within the elite wealth management sector. The Partnership program, launched to complement Sanctuary's Enterprise Partnership Program, aims to drive growth and development in the industry.

news.headline: VestGen Wealth Partners in Chicago completes C-Suite buildout with industry veterans to achieve ambitious growth goals.
news.summary: A team of experienced professionals will implement the company's distinctive value proposition to meet its ambitious growth targets. Based in Chicago, as of February 20, 2025, VestGen Wealth Partners, LLC (VestGen) is leading the way in wealth management by addressing advisor succession challenges. This innovative approach aims to drive significant industry transformation and growth.

news.headline: CEO confidence rose sharply in Q1 2025, increasing by 9 points to 60, the highest in 3 years, signaling a shift to confident optimism.
news.summary: The Conference Board Measure of CEO Confidence™, in partnership with The Business Council, rose by 9 points in Q1 2025 to reach 60, marking its highest level in three years. This shift reflects a transition from cautious optimism to confident optimism among CEOs as economic conditions improve. This is the first time the index has reached such heights, indicating a growing sense of positivity and expectation among business leaders.

news.headline: Theravance Biopharma (NASDAQ: TBPH) to present at TD Cowen 45th Annual Health Care Conference on March 4 at 11:50 am EST.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, Theravance Biopharma, Inc. (NASDAQ: TBPH) announced its participation in the TD Cowen 45th Annual Health Care Conference scheduled for March 4 at 11:50 am EST (8:50 am PST/4:50 pm GMT). The company will also hold in-person meetings with investors.

news.headline: EPAM's Q4 2024: Revenue $1.248B (up 7.9% YoY), GAAP Income 10.9%, GAAP EPS $1.80 (up 8.4%), Non-GAAP EPS $2.84 (up 3.3%).
news.summary: In the last quarter of 2024, the company reported revenues of $1.248 billion, showing a 7.9% increase compared to the previous year. GAAP Income from Operations accounted for 10.9% of revenues, while Non-GAAP Income from Operations represented 16.7% of revenues. The GAAP Diluted EPS stood at $1.80, marking an 8.4% rise, and the Non-GAAP Diluted EPS was $2.84, reflecting a 3.3% increase.

news.headline: Boost Mobile is launching iPhone 16e, available for pre-order on Feb 21 for $199.99 for new customers with ported number and Unlimited Premium plan.
news.summary: A latest addition to the iPhone 16 lineup, the iPhone 16e, is now open for Pre-Order commencing on Friday, February 21. Interested new customers of Boost Mobile have the opportunity to secure the iPhone 16e for just $199.99 by transferring their existing number and subscribing to Boost's Unlimited Premium plan. This offer is specifically aimed at boosting mobile capabilities and attracting users. The exciting news was announced from LITTLETON, Colo., on February 20, 2025.

news.headline: Cascades Inc. reports Q4 2024 sales of $1,211 million, marking growth from previous quarters.
news.summary: In Kingsey Falls, Quebec, on February 20, 2025, Cascades Inc. (TSX: CAS) released its unaudited financial report for the quarterly and annual period concluding on December 31, 2024. In the fourth quarter of 2024, the company achieved sales of $1,211 million, showcasing an increase from $1,201 million in the previous quarter and $1,138 million in the same quarter of the prior year.

news.headline: City Office REIT, Inc. announced Q4 2024 revenues of $41.9 million.
news.summary: In Vancouver on February 20, 2025, City Office REIT, Inc. (NYSE: CIO) disclosed its financial outcomes for the quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2024. Key figures from the fourth quarter revealed that the company generated $41.9 million in revenue from rentals and other sources. Additionally, the GAAP net profit for the period showcased positive growth.

news.headline: ez1095 now offers ACA form processing in-app without a TCC. File 1095 electronically using ez1095's e-file service. New 2024 software from Halfpricesoft.com.
news.summary: Easily file Form 1095 electronically using self-filing or ez1095's in-app e-file service with the new 2024 version of ez1095 software available from Halfpricesoft.com. Released by developers in REDMOND, Wash., on Feb. 20, 2025, this updated software offers enhanced security and efficiency for ACA processing. Don't miss out on this improved tool for managing ACA documents.

news.headline: Senao Networks introduces AI-powered 4K cameras for panoramic surveillance. Features two models - SLD0803-VR & SLD0801-FX. Premiering at 2025 MWC.
news.summary: Taipei, Feb. 20, 2025 - A major player in cutting-edge networking and computing solutions, Senao Networks Inc. has unveiled its newest AI-driven 4K Image Analytics Cameras, namely the SLD0803-VR and SLD0801-FX. These advanced products are set to be displayed at the upcoming 2025 Mobile World Congress (MWC).

news.headline: China Yuchai partners in Vietnam, boosting powertrain solutions. Key player in China, Guangxi Yuchai Machinery involved.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, in Singapore, China Yuchai International Limited (NYSE: CYD), a leading powertrain solutions manufacturer, conducted operations through its primary subsidiary, Guangxi Yuchai Machinery Company Limited ("Yuchai"). China Yuchai is recognized as one of the largest companies in this industry.

news.headline: Utz Brands reports $341.0 million in 4Q’24 net sales; Organic net sales flat, Branded Salty Snacks up 2.9%. Net income $2 million.
news.summary: In Hanover, Pennsylvania, Utz Brands, Inc. (NYSE: UTZ) announced their financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 29, 2024. During the fourth quarter of 2024, the company reported net sales of $341.0 million, with organic net sales holding steady and branded salty snacks showing a 2.9% increase. There was an expansion of 230 basis points in both gross profit margin and adjusted gross profit margin. The net income for the quarter was $2 million. Utz Brands is a prominent U.S. manufacturer of branded salty snacks and is considered a small-cap value in the staples equity market.

news.headline: Cécred partners with Ulta Beauty for largest hair care launch in history; available in 1,400+ stores from April 6, 2025.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Cécred, renowned for its innovative hair care products, is making its debut in retail by partnering with Ulta Beauty, the leading beauty retailer in the United States. Beginning on April 6, 2025, customers can find the award-winning hair care line, created by Beyoncé Knowles-Carter, in over 1,400 Ulta Beauty stores across the country as well as online. This milestone marks the most significant hair product launch exclusively at Ulta Beauty. The unveiling aligns with the brand's upcoming one-year anniversary.

news.headline: Lamar Advertising releases Q4 and full-year 2024 financial performance.
NewGen gets Nasdaq listing extension, appoints Thorain Ko as Business Development Director.
news.summary: A company has been granted permission to maintain its listing on the Nasdaq stock exchange. Concurrently, the company has appointed Thorain Ko to spearhead business development efforts.

news.headline: Black Gold has started drilling at the Fritz Well in Clay County, Illinois Basin.
news.summary: Exploratory drilling has started at the Fritz well located in Clay County. The well is expected to reach a depth of approximately 10,000 feet. This drilling project is part of a larger exploration effort in the area and is estimated to cost around $2 million. The goal of the project is to assess the potential for oil and gas reserves in the region. The drilling operation is expected to take several weeks to complete, with regular updates on the progress of the project to be provided.

news.headline: FTAI Aviation's Audit Committee found short seller reports of January 2025 to be baseless. Expected timely 10-K filing.
news.summary: FTAI Aviation Ltd. (NASDAQ: FTAI) based in New York disclosed on February 20, 2025, that after a thorough review by the Board of Directors’ Audit Committee with the assistance of external legal and forensic accounting experts, the claims made by specific short seller reports in January 2025 have been found to be unsubstantiated. The company confirmed that the allegations were baseless. They anticipate submitting their Form 10-K within the established deadline.

news.headline: LKQ Corp reported strong Q4 & 2024 results, Europe segment achieved 10.1% EBITDA margin, highest EBITDA for the full year.
news.summary: In Antioch, Tennessee, on February 20, 2025, LKQ Corporation (Nasdaq: LKQ) released its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. Justin Jude, the President and CEO, expressed pride in the team's performance amidst challenging market conditions, highlighting the Europe segment's record EBITDA margin of 10.1% in Q4. This marked the third consecutive quarter of double-digit EBITDA margins for the Europe segment, with 2024 seeing the segment's highest EBITDA dollars for a full year. The company's focus moving forward will be on portfolio simplification, operational excellence, and profitable growth to enhance shareholder value.

news.headline: Constellium reveals Q4 and full year 2024 results, sets new long-term targets. $CSTMNYSE.
news.summary: Paris, February 20, 2025 - Leading global company Constellium SE (NYSE: CSTM) released its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2024.

news.headline: A new NOCISCAN technology will be featured at the 2025 Spine Summit, presenting groundbreaking advancements.
news.summary: A recent report highlighted that the global COVID-19 death toll has now surpassed 5 million, with over 250 million confirmed cases worldwide. The United States remains the most affected country, with over 48 million cases and 800,000 deaths. In response, various countries have been ramping up vaccination efforts, with over 6 billion doses administered globally. Despite progress, health officials continue to emphasize the importance of maintaining safety measures to prevent further spread of the virus.

news.headline: Aaron's partners with Front Row Motorsports for multiple races. Todd Gilliland and Zane Smith to drive. .
news.summary: A retail company specializing in lease-to-own agreements is set to collaborate with Todd Gilliland and Zane Smith in Mooresville, North Carolina. On February 20, 2025, Front Row Motorsports confirmed the partnership with Aaron's, based in Atlanta, a major player in this sector. This deal follows significant anticipation and promotion surrounding this development. This collaboration signals a major move in the industry and promises to bring new opportunities for growth and exposure to both parties involved.

news.headline: Nexa AI improves DeepSeek R1 Distill performance with NexaQuant on AMD, boosting inference and decreasing memory usage.
news.summary: Nexa AI has unveiled their latest innovation, NexaQuant technology, for their DeepSeek R1 Distills. This technology is designed to enhance performance on AMD platforms by boosting inference capabilities and decreasing memory usage. Users can expect a significant improvement in efficiency, making it a valuable upgrade for those seeking optimized AI operations.

news.headline: ECB's Simkus: I don't see any good reason not to cut in March.
ECB's Simkus: The direction of travel is clear, next move clear.
US stocks showing resilience, rebounding to pre-pandemic levels amid market turbulence.
ECB's Simkus: I agree with expectations for 3 more cuts in 2025.
Eigenmann & Veronelli appoints Mario Paterlini and Hidde van der Wal as new independent directors to support growth. 7-member board.
news.summary: In RHO, Italy, Eigenmann & Veronelli, a prominent distributor of specialty chemicals and food ingredients, has appointed Mario Paterlini and Hidde van der Wal as independent Non-Executive Directors of the board. This announcement comes as the company expands its leadership team, with the two new Directors joining the existing five-member board as of February 2025. The addition of Paterlini and van der Wal is a strategic move in line with Eigenmann & Veronelli's growth strategy.
